options.a: Ice crystal icing occurs when snowflakes and super cooled droplets mix and form rime ice.
options.b: Ice crystal icing is the reason for several engine failures below 10000 ft in the past years.
options.c: Ice crystal icing is a threat for the engines at high altitudes (in cruise).
options.d: Ice crystal icing is a threat for the airframe at high altitudes (in cruise).
